message:
feat(parser): add IrBuilder::set_class_generics for generic type params

Add set_class_generics() method to IrBuilder for populating the new
generics field on IrClassNodeMeta. Follows the same pattern as
set_class_stereotype() — looks up node by class name and sets the
generics on its class_meta.

Parser-side extraction of ~T~ syntax from class names will follow
when the parser file becomes available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
